latestIgtvVideos.caption: It was never about what she got from basketball. It was always about what she gave back. Gigi gave inspiration to her teammates, her mentors, and the next generation. #PlayGigisWay @mambamambacitasports

Tiger would. Would you?
Break barriers. Set records. Play through pain and never call it a comeback. 

Tiger is never done.

Don‚Äôt call this the perfect Hollywood ending, because this is just the beginning. 

LA is never done.

ADVANTAGE, @rafaelnadal. 
 
1. FIRST SLAM ONLY NINETEEN YEARS OLD. 
2. SECOND SLAM. 
3. THIRD SLAM.
4. STILL UNDEFEATED ON CLAY.
5. GREATEST GAME EVER. FIVE SET THRILLER TO CLAIM FIRST TROPHY AWAY FROM CLAY. THEN THE GOLD MEDAL.
6. FIRST HARD COURT SLAM AT AUS.
7.  BACK TO WINNING WAYS ON CLAY. 
8. SECOND WIN AT SW19.
9. FIRST TRIUMPH AT FLUSHING MEADOWS MEANS TROPHY CABINET IS NOW FULL. 
10. 6TH FRENCH.
11. RECORD BREAKING SEVENTH FRENCH. 
12. RECORD EXTENDING EIGHTH FRENCH. 
13. SECOND US.
14. MOST CONSECUTIVE FRENCH TITLES BUT WHAT FOLLOWS IS TWO YEARS WITHOUT WINNING A TROPHY. IS IT THE END OF HIS CAREER? 
15. DEFIES THE DOUBTERS BY BECOMING THE ONLY MAN TO WIN TEN TROPHIES IN A SINGLE SLAM. 
16. THIRD US. 
17. RECORD EXTENDING ELEVENTH FRENCH.
18. RECORD EXTENDING TWELFTH FRENCH.
19. FIVE SET EPIC US TITLE. 
20 RECORD EQUALING 20TH SLAM. 
 
DEUCE. 
 
21. ADVANTAGE, NADAL.

‚ÄúIt doesn‚Äôt matter where you start because when you play to lift your people, no hoop is too high.‚Äù 

The world may know @giannis_an34 as an MVP and NBA champion, but it‚Äôs his work off the court that‚Äôs truly special. 

The AntetokounBros Academy is more than basketball, it‚Äôs a space where kids from diverse backgrounds are given the chance to unleash and develop their potential through sport. Where everyone and anyone feels they belong. 

With the help of @onassis.stegi and @eurohoops_official, Giannis has created something that he never had growing up. A place where you‚Äôre encouraged to follow your passion and where having fun is as important as working hard. On or off the court, one thing is for certain, Giannis is Never Done changing the game.

‚ÄúWhen you figure out what makes you happy, you gotta keep doing it because you‚Äôre gonna be the best version of yourself.‚Äù

‚ÄúI think it is really important for black women to see themselves in others. We need to start sharing our stories more. We need to find ways to support each other, talk about hair and running because my gosh it‚Äôs hard. And also celebrate each other.‚Äù - @j_nesi
‚ÝÄ
The final episode of the Common Thread series with Uninterrupted highlights those who relentlessly go forward together, from the track to the streets. Celebrating the power of sport to create community, inclusivity and sisterhood, athletes @vashtizzle, Jasmine Nesi of @rungrlco, and @sahraisha of¬Ý@asra.club emphasize how our strides are united, moving through a marathon of collective progress.¬Ý#BHM #UntilWeAllWin

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
‚ÝÄ
‚ÝÄ
‚ÄúMy color doesn‚Äôt stop me from doing what I want to do. We‚Äôre all playing with the same ball, we‚Äôre playing with eleven players on each side. Football isn‚Äôt made for a certain person. Football is a universal language, anyone can play it.‚Äù - Debra Nelson
‚ÝÄ
The second episode of the Common Thread series featuring Debra Nelson (@FootballBeyondBorders), @its_kairabaaa (@fcharlem) and @cdunn19 (@uswnt) focuses on sport‚Äôs ability to transcend borders and boundaries with something as simple as a ball and a goal.

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
‚ÄúAt first, my abuela, she didn‚Äôt get it. ‚ÄòDalia, it‚Äôs too rough for a girl. Your mom was a cheerleader ‚Äì why don‚Äôt you be a cheerleader?‚Äô Football is where I get my strength. Where I prove that nothing is off-limits. Where I can be whatever I want.‚Äù
‚ÝÄ
Dalia Hurtado‚Äôs family had specific expectations of her: Work hard, get good grades, and follow in her mother‚Äôs footsteps as a cheerleader. But cheering on the sideline was never an option for Dalia.
‚ÝÄ
As a kid in Mexico, she was the only girl who would play soccer with the boys, and after moving back to East LA with her abuela, she set her sights on football. At 16, she became the only girl to make the varsity team at her high school. Two years later, she‚Äôs inspired more girls to play football at her high school.
‚ÝÄ
Through football, Dalia is re-writing the story her family wrote for her, breaking through stereotypes, and empowering her community to do the same ‚Äì one game at a time.
latestIgtvVideos.title: Dalia: Cambiando el Futuro

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
‚ÝÄ
‚ÝÄ
‚ÄúI was born in Breda, but it's the things I‚Äôve overcome on my journey from there that have made me the player I am today." - @virgilvandijk

Virgil Van Dijk was a football-obsessed kid playing on cage courts near his southern Holland home.

Years later and with many challenges overcome, he's a European Champion and recognized as the world‚Äôs best defender.

This is his Birthplace of Dreams. #justdoit

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
‚ÄúIt seemed too far, too crazy, too hard. But we never thought it was impossible.‚Äù
‚ÝÄ
Thai superstars @rachwinwong and @artiwara ran over 2,000 kilometers across Thailand ‚Äì that‚Äôs one marathon a day for 55 days ‚Äì to raise awareness about the country‚Äôs healthcare problems.
‚ÝÄ
But this was not the only finish line out there for them. It‚Äôs just the start of their crazy dream to change the world for the better, one run at a time. #justdoit
